title: Caribou Loses Control
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Zoro, Luffy, Nami, Sanji, Usopp. The core story beat is caribou loses control.
scene: The scene centers on caribou loses control, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Zoro, Luffy, Nami, Sanji, Usopp driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now we are heading straight for an underwater mountain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We may be underwater... but if it's only for an instant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoaaa aa! Those hands are huge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's Robin for you!! We're Saved!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that damn octopus... is it trying to stop him before he can do anything?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eh?! Sanji- San just popped right out of his bubble!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what the heck's up with that speed?! He's like a fish- man!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Running... and running....!! I spent two long years running from those hideous people..!!! callyoursele a monster?! hah....you're almost cuteeeeeeeeeeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it, zero!! Sanji!! Stop chopping off its tentacles!!!

summary: Caribou Loses Control. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
